message:
🌱 Add prometheus: Incorrect queries results after Prometheus restart with mission (#1689)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "prometheus-9725-incorrect-queries-results-after-prometheus-restart-with-memory-s",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "prometheus: Incorrect queries results after Prometheus restart with memory-snapshot-on-shutdown enabled",
+    "description": "Incorrect queries results after Prometheus restart with memory-snapshot-on-shutdown enabled. This issue affects 12+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify prometheus troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your prometheus deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus -n prometheus --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review prometheus configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant prometheus configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus\nkubectl get configmap -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=prometheus\n```\n**What did you do?**\nTwo days ago we have upgraded to Prometheus from 2.30.1 to 2.30.3 and **enabled** the experimental feature \"memory-snapshot-on-shutdown (was disabled before)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Incorrect queries results after Prometheus restart with…",
+        "description": "## Context\n\nFor a given label value pair foo=\"bar\", we store a list call \"postings list\" which has all the series references that this label value belongs to. For a label-value pair, the list is sorted in the block's index and also in the memory.\n\nBut, they might not appear in order in the WAL. And\n```yaml\nprometheus, version 2.30.3 (branch: HEAD, revision: f29caccc42557f6a8ec30ea9b3c8c089391bd5df)\n  build user:       root@5cff4265f0e3\n  build date:       20211005-16:10:52\n  go version:       go1.17.1\n  platform:         linux/amd64\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Incorrect queries results after Prometheus… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus -n prometheus --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n prometheus --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Context\n\nFor a given label value pair foo=\"bar\", we store a list call \"postings list\" which has all the series references that this label value belongs to. For a label-value pair, the list is sorted in the block's index and also in the memory.\n\nBut, they might not appear in order in the WAL. And when we replay the WAL, we simply add the postings in this list unordered.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "prometheus, version 2.30.3 (branch: HEAD, revision: f29caccc42557f6a8ec30ea9b3c8c089391bd5df)\n  build user:       root@5cff4265f0e3\n  build date:       20211005-16:10:52\n  go version:       go1.17.1\n  platform:         linux/amd64",
+        "level=error ts=2021-11-12T16:04:58.275Z caller=main.go:872 msg=\"Error stopping storage\" err=\"chunk snapshot: find last chunk snapshot: chunk snapshot chunk_snapshot.005427.0089587712.tmp is not in the right format\"\nlevel=error ts=2021-11-12T15:00:17.417Z caller=head.go:492 component=tsdb msg=\"Failed to load chunk snapshot\" err=\"find last chunk snapshot: chunk snapshot chunk_snapshot.005427.0089587712.tmp is not in the right format\"\nlevel=error ts=2021-11-12T14:58:29.446Z caller=main.go:872 msg=\"Error stopping storage\" err=\"chunk snapshot: find last chunk snapshot: chunk snapshot chunk_snapshot.005427.0089587712.tmp is not in the right format\"\nlevel=error ts=2021-11-12T13:30:34.323Z caller=head.go:492 component=tsdb msg=\"Failed to load chunk snapshot\" err=\"find last chunk snapshot: chunk sn",
+        "level=warn ts=2021-11-20T06:30:54.115Z caller=head_wal.go:360 ### ### component=tsdb msg=\"Unknown series references\" samples=31351 exemplars=0  \nlevel=info ts=2021-11-20T06:30:54.115Z caller=head.go:590 component=tsdb msg=\"WAL segment loaded\" segment=4030 maxSegment=4256"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "prometheus",
+      "graduated",
